---
title: "CompMurAnomMon.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mur-sst.html)

Monthly MUR anomaly composite generation.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mur-daily-workflows/scripts/MonthlyProc/CompMurAnomMon.py >}}
```

:::
